description_long: This is a multi-story brick commercial building with a ground-floor pizzeria, as indicated by the prominent 'DELI AND PIZZA' signage above the entrance. The structure features classic red-brown brickwork, large rectangular windows with white frames, and black metal fire escapes on two sides. The building also houses a dry cleaning and laundromat business, as shown by additional signage. The roof is flat with visible skylights and utility elements, and the rear includes a large garage door and a secondary entrance. The building sits on a concrete sidewalk base, with a paved area suggesting a driveway or parking access.
description: A multi-story brick pizzeria with ground-floor signage, fire escapes, and a flat roof with skylights, set on a concrete sidewalk base.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main pizzeria entrance, large signage, and street-facing windows, with fire escapes visible on the taller section.
description_view_1: The rear view highlights a large garage door, plain brickwork, and several windows, with minimal signage.
description_view_2: The side view reveals a metal fire escape, a secondary door, and a vertical utility pipe running up the building.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays a blank wall, the flat roof with skylights, and the side windows of the pizzeria section.
